name: M-122
events: 16 Mar 1943 M-122 torpedoed and sank the German merchant Johannisberger (4533 GRT, former French Lyon) off the Varangerfjord about 15 nautical miles east of Vadso, Norway in position 70°12'N, 30°51'E.
29 Mar 1943 M-122 fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 6000 tons off Kiberg, Norway. Both torpedoes missed their target.
17 Apr 1943 M-122 fires two torpedoes against the German naval auxiliary Giselau off Kiberg, Norway. Both torpedoes missed their target.
